zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Bowes於大約1395年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓時，他的父親Robert Bowes21歲，母親Jane Conyers20歲。他於大約1415年與Joan de Greystoke在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1465年10月11日在英國達勒姆斯特亞特拉姆 安德 斯泰頓享年71歲，埋葬在英國。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Bowes was born about 1395, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Bowes, was 21 and his mother, Jane Conyers, was 20. He married Joan de Greystoke about 1415, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 11 October 1465, in Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, England, at the age of 71, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Bowes est né environ 1395, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Bowes, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Jane Conyers, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan de Greystoke environ 1415, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 11 octobre 1465, à Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Bowes(이)가 대략 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Bowes(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane Conyers(은)는 20세였다. 그는 대략 1415년 영국에서 Joan de Greystoke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1465년 10월 11일 영국 뒤람 스트리틀램 앤드 스테인턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Bowes nasceu aproximadamente 1395, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Bowes, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Jane Conyers, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan de Greystoke aproximadamente 1415, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 11 de outubro de 1465, em Streatlam and Stainton, Durham, Inglaterra, com 71 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Bowes родился около 1395 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Bowes было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Jane Conyers, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan de Greystoke около 1415 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 11 октября 1465 г. в местности стритлэм анд стеинтон, дурам, Англия в возрасте 71 год и был похоронен в местности Англия.
